headlines.title: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified information
headlines.description: Former national security adviser John Bolton pleaded guilty in federal court Friday to mishandling classified information related to his work during the first Trump administration

headlines.title: The Force is with him: D.C. settles with man who protested National Guard using Darth Vader’s theme song
headlines.description: The District of Columbia has settled a lawsuit by a protester who said he was detained and handcuffed for following National Guard troops around the city while playing Darth Vader’s theme song from “Star Wars.”

headlines.title: After losing one billionaire tax battle, Gavin Newsom prepares to wage another
headlines.description: California’s governor, who is considering a White House run, proposed an expansive national wealth tax, as well as an initiative to give Americans a stake in AI.

headlines.title: ‘It’s a bad time to be a normal’: House Republican on current political environment
headlines.description: Rep. Dusty Johnson (R-S.D.) reacts to President Trump's decision to cancel the signing of the bipartisan housing affordability bill. Rep. Johnson also discusses the president’s Iran strategy and the current political environment.

headlines.title: Trump calls Democrats ‘godless communists’ as part of latest midterm messaging
headlines.description: President Trump looks to rally his base ahead of the midterms as tensions with Republicans and with Iran threaten to derail his affordability message. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez, Courtney Kube and Allie Canal join Meet the Press NOW with the latest on Trump’s midterm messaging and the continued fallout of the war with Iran.

headlines.title: John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified information
headlines.description: Former Trump national security adviser John Bolton has pleaded guilty to retaining national security information. NBC News' Ryan Reilly reports on the sentence Bolton could face.

headlines.title: Civil rights, moon landings and war wins: What Americans see as the country’s greatest achievements
headlines.description: The NBC News poll asked American adults which historical event they thought was the country’s biggest accomplishment in its 250 years.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: GOP nominee for N.Y. governor likens House candidate Brad Lander to Nazi camp guard
headlines.description: The GOP nominee for N.Y. governor later said Lander, who’s running for Congress, would have been a “collaborator” with the Nazis. Both candidates are Jewish.

headlines.title: ‘The decision is sickening’: MAHA leaders feel betrayed by Supreme Court ruling on Roundup weed killer
headlines.description: The Trump administration backed Bayer, the maker of Roundup, angering prominent voices in the “Make America Healthy Again” movement.

headlines.title: DHS watchdog to review ICE detainee deaths, use of force
headlines.description: The reviews, announced Thursday, follow an increase in deaths at ICE facilities and a DHS inspector general’s report describing violations of use of force.
